parameters.query:
SELECT ol.id as lead_id, ol.email, ol.phone, ol.status as lead_status,
       no.id as onboarding_id, no.status as onb_status, no.slug, no.builder_token,
       na.id as account_id, na.slug as account_slug, na.status as account_status
FROM outreach_leads ol
LEFT JOIN nv_onboarding no ON lower(trim(no.email)) = lower(trim(ol.email))
LEFT JOIN nv_accounts na ON na.email = ol.email
WHERE ol.status IN ('NEW', 'CONTACTED', 'IN_CONVERSATION', 'QUALIFIED', 'ONBOARDING')
  AND (no.id IS NOT NULL OR na.id IS NOT NULL)
  AND (ol.onboarding_id IS DISTINCT FROM no.id
       OR ol.account_id IS DISTINCT FROM na.id
       OR ol.onboarding_status IS DISTINCT FROM COALESCE(no.status::text, na.status))
LIMIT 200;

UPDATE outreach_leads SET
  onboarding_id = '{{ $json.onboarding_id }}'::uuid,
  account_id = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.account_id }}' != '' THEN '{{ $json.account_id }}'::uuid ELSE account_id END,
  store_slug = COALESCE('{{ $json.slug }}', '{{ $json.account_slug }}', store_slug),
  onboarding_status = COALESCE('{{ $json.onb_status }}', '{{ $json.account_status }}', onboarding_status),
  builder_url = CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $json.builder_token }}' != '' 
    THEN 'https://novavision.com.ar/builder?token=' || '{{ $json.builder_token }}'
    ELSE builder_url 
  END,
  status = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.account_status }}' = 'active' THEN 'WON'
    WHEN '{{ $json.onb_status }}' IN ('in_progress', 'submitted', 'review') THEN 'ONBOARDING'
    WHEN status = 'NEW' OR status = 'CONTACTED' THEN 'QUALIFIED'
    ELSE status
  END,
  won_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.account_status }}' = 'active' AND won_at IS NULL THEN now() ELSE won_at END,
  qualified_at = CASE WHEN qualified_at IS NULL AND '{{ $json.onboarding_id }}' != '' THEN now() ELSE qualified_at END,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.lead_id }}'::uuid;

INSERT INTO outreach_logs (lead_id, direction, channel, content, processing_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.lead_id }}'::uuid,
  'system',
  'internal',
  'Bridge sync: onboarding_status={{ $json.onb_status || $json.account_status }}, account={{ $json.account_id }}, slug={{ $json.slug || $json.account_slug }}',
  'processed'
);

SELECT 
  'bridge_run' as type,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE onboarding_id IS NOT NULL) as leads_linked,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'ONBOARDING') as leads_onboarding,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM outreach_leads WHERE status = 'WON') as leads_won,
  now() as run_at;

meta.description: Cron cada 2h. Cruza email de outreach_leads con nv_onboarding y nv_accounts. Sincroniza estados: si empezó onboarding → ONBOARDING, si tiene account activa → WON. Registra timestamps en qualified_at/won_at.
